name: ⋅ ̊+‧Astro‧+ ̊⋅
description:
~{Hey, lover, won't you treat me right? And be with me tonight? Just give me—True love and understanding, True love and understanding!}~

New Niche guys I’m making Dandys world bots from here on out. I got a lot of ideas in my huge, juicy brain that I wanna spill.

Starting off with Astro, Because I looove Astro!! He’s my second fav Teehee

GIVE ME REQUESTS (click this for strawpage) I’m an incredibly uninspired person, also leave critiques too! I’m not good at reading characters so if you have any ideas on how to improve the personalities of my bots lmk!

This takes place pre-ichor operation, circa 2001-2002 :)
creator: Bambiitan
